message:
test(fcp-host): add golden vector test for supervisor restart policy

Add a data-driven golden vector test that replays a sequence of crash
events against the RestartTracker state machine, verifying restart
decisions (allow/deny), backoff delays, and denial reasons match
expected outcomes defined in a JSON fixture.

- Add RestartPolicyGoldenVector/Policy/Crash deserialization types
- Add tracker_matches_supervisor_restart_policy_golden_vector test
  that loads the fixture via include_str! and replays 4 crash events
  (3 allowed restarts with exponential backoff, 1 denied when max
  restarts exceeded)
- Add tests/vectors/host/supervisor_restart_policy.json fixture with
  policy config (max_restarts: 3, backoff: 100ms base, 2x multiplier,
  10s max, 60s window) and expected outcomes
- Apply rustfmt formatting to backoff/health scheduler tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+{
+  "policy": {
+    "max_restarts": 3,
+    "backoff_base_ms": 100,
+    "backoff_max_ms": 10000,
+    "backoff_multiplier": 2.0,
+    "window_seconds": 60
+  },
+  "crashes": [
+    {
+      "at_ms": 0,
+      "restart": true,
+      "delay_ms": 100,
+      "reason": null
+    },
+    {
+      "at_ms": 200,
+      "restart": true,
+      "delay_ms": 200,
+      "reason": null
+    },
+    {
+      "at_ms": 600,
+      "restart": true,
+      "delay_ms": 400,
+      "reason": null
+    },
+    {
+      "at_ms": 1500,
+      "restart": false,
+      "delay_ms": null,
+      "reason": "max_restarts_exceeded"
+    }
+  ]
+}
